title: Document and enforce the complete self-host gate
goal: Make the final self-host completion criteria explicit, automated, and easy to rerun from a clean checkout.
context: This task should run after the earlier technical gaps have been closed or narrowed.
The gate should not rely on undocumented manual steps.
steps: Create or finalize one top-level self-host verification command.
Ensure it runs the example parity gate, repeated-stage bootstrap gate, and fixed-point gate.
Update README.md, docs/SELFHOST.md, ROADMAP.md, SELFHOST_WORK.md, and selfhost/README.md with the final command and status.
Remove stale language that describes achieved behavior as only a prototype if the full gate now passes; otherwise clearly state remaining gaps.
done_when: A clean-checkout developer can run one documented command to verify self-hosting.
All Ralph self-host tasks are either passing or clearly blocked with a remaining gap.
